initial_prompt:
Super-Eywa v1 runtime prompt snapshot.
Turn index: 1
Node depth: 0
Allowed decisions: ['execute_locally']
Prompt family: execute
Base header prompt: ''
Selected prompt text:
Identify the specific theoretical term or nomenclature used to define the 'Black Hole Classicality Constants' in the context of single-photon Hawking radiation. Search for the exact mathematical definitions and the specific numerical values associated with these constants in the relevant scientific literature. Once the specific constants are identified, verify they are dimensionless and universal as required.

}

Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: atlas-derived-A3-black-hole-classicality-constants
Title: A3. Black Hole Classicality Constants

Problem:
What are the universal dimensionless constants governing single-photon Hawking radiation classicality?

Grading target:
Exact numerical match on all three values.
